backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no functionality, serving as a placeholder since the site is purely static.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: the ApplicationSection form component and its addition to the Header navigation, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary file describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens using the OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata, favicon links, and Google Search Console verification for Dream Jobs Consultancy.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order, including the new ApplicationSection placed between TestimonialsSection and ContactSection.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying company description emphasizing professionalism and ethics, plus four stat/value cards covering experience, global reach, placements, and licensing.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationSecti: Job application form component with fields for full name, email, phone, nationality, position (dropdown), years of experience, and resume upload, including validation and a success state.
frontend/src/components/ConnectWithUsSec: Social media section that conditionally renders links to Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and Instagram only when URLs are configured in the socialLinks config.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with office address, phone, email, and business hours cards, plus a WhatsApp CTA button for Dream Jobs Consultancy.
frontend/src/components/DisclaimerSectio: Displays an 'Important Information' section with four disclaimer cards covering job placements, service fees, visa processing, and legal compliance.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with company branding, quick navigation links, UAE and India office details, contact info, and social media icon links.
frontend/src/components/FounderSection.t: Showcases founder Basheer Ahmed with a photo and a branded quote/bio card highlighting his 3 years of international recruitment experience.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed responsive header with smooth-scroll navigation links for desktop and a slide-out Sheet menu for mobile, including an 'Apply' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-width hero section with a background image, headline, bullet-point value propositions, and 'Apply Now' plus WhatsApp CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Renders a 4-step horizontal timeline section (Submit CV, Matching, Interview, Deployment) explaining the overseas job placement process, with a note about the average 4-8 week timeline.
frontend/src/components/JobCategoriesSec: Displays job categories (e.g., Engineering, Healthcare, Construction) in a responsive grid on desktop and an accordion on mobile, each listing specific job roles within that category.
frontend/src/components/ManagementSectio: Showcases the management team member Salman Khan with his title and contact cards for India and UAE offices, including WhatsApp links and phone numbers.
frontend/src/components/OurOfficesSectio: Displays the company's three office locations (UAE/Ajman, India/Bengaluru, India/Ahmedabad) with addresses and license info, alongside an office location image.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentProce: Presents a detailed 6-step recruitment process (from application review to deployment and support) in a numbered card grid, ending with a support callout banner.
Renders a grid of six service offerings (job placement, CV enhancement, interview prep, employer coordination, documentation, candidate support) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays a paginated/carousel testimonials section with 10+ candidate success stories, star ratings, and navigation controls using React state and Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/VisionMissionSec: Renders a styled section presenting the company's Vision, Mission, and four Core Values (Integrity, Candidate-First, Excellence, Care) with icon cards on a gradient background.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloat.ts: A floating action button component that links to a WhatsApp chat via a hardcoded phone number, fixed-positioned on the page.
frontend/src/components/WhyTrustUsSectio: Displays eight trust-building points (e.g., licensed, verified employers, legal compliance) and four success metrics in a grid layout on a gradient background.
frontend/src/config/socialLinks.ts: Exports a centralized `socialLinks` config object with empty strings for Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram; empty values suppress rendering of those icons in the UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A minimal placeholder hook that returns an empty object, noting that no backend queries are needed for this static website.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins/Roboto fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark brand color schemes, and sets global styles like smooth scrolling and a custom scrollbar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors (brand, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Gulf Careers Portal project state at version 3, recording two completed features: creating a job application form component (ApplicationSection.tsx) and adding it to the site header navigation.
